allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; files=[f['name'] for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'iana-' in f['name'] or 'ieee' in f['name']]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(files\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in items]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; files=[f['name'] for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'iana-' in f['name'] or 'ssh' in f['name'] or 'tls' in f['name'] or 'icmp' in f['name']]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(files\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['path']\) for f in data.get\('tree',[]\) if 'iana-routing-types' in f.get\('path',''\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['repository']['full_name'], i['path']\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
